passed_checks.check_name: Suspicious use of netcat with IP address

steps.name: Copy artifacts to GCS
steps.run:
echo "=== DEBUG INFO ==="
echo "Target Bucket: ${GCS_BUCKET}"
echo "Repo Name: $REPO_NAME"
echo "Branch: $BRANCH_NAME"
echo "Run ID: $RUN_ID"
echo "Raw Path: gs://${GCS_BUCKET}/raw/$REPO_NAME/$BRANCH_NAME/$RUN_ID/"
echo "=================="

# Robust copy: copy contents to avoid nested folders
gsutil -m cp -r outputs/* "gs://${GCS_BUCKET}/raw/$REPO_NAME/$BRANCH_NAME/$RUN_ID/"
gsutil -m cp -r normalized/* "gs://${GCS_BUCKET}/normalized/$REPO_NAME/$BRANCH_NAME/$RUN_ID/"
gsutil -m cp -r correlated/* "gs://${GCS_BUCKET}/correlated/$REPO_NAME/$BRANCH_NAME/$RUN_ID/"

echo "=== VERIFICATION ==="
gsutil ls "gs://${GCS_BUCKET}/raw/$REPO_NAME/$BRANCH_NAME/$RUN_ID/" || echo "Failed to list raw"

gsutil ls "gs://${GCS_BUCKET}/normalized/$REPO_NAME/$BRANCH_NAME/$RUN_ID/" || echo "Failed to list normalized"

code_block:
name: Export to GCS
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: publish_artifacts
    steps:
      - name: Checkout PipelineGuard
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          repository: CLUE-BDI/pipelineguard
          token: ${{ secrets.PIPELINEGUARD_PAT }}

      - name: Checkout target repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          repository: ${{ inputs.target_repository || github.repository }}
          token: ${{ secrets.PIPELINEGUARD_PAT }}
          path: ${{ inputs.target_repo_path }}

      - name: Download published artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: published-artifacts-${{ inputs.target_repo_name }}
          path: .

      - name: Authenticate to Google Cloud
        uses: google-github-actions/auth@v2
        with:
          credentials_json: ${{ secrets.GCP_CREDENTIALS || secrets.GCP_SA_KEY_JSON }}

      - name: Setup gcloud
        uses: google-github-actions/setup-gcloud@v2

      - name: Copy artifacts to GCS
        env:
          REPO_NAME: ${{ github.event.repository.name }}
          BRANCH_NAME: ${{ github.ref_name }}
          RUN_ID: ${{ github.run_id }}
        run: |
          echo "=== DEBUG INFO ==="
          echo "Target Bucket: ${GCS_BUCKET}"
          echo "Repo Name: $REPO_NAME"
          echo "Branch: $BRANCH_NAME"
          echo "Run ID: $RUN_ID"
          echo "Raw Path: gs://${GCS_BUCKET}/raw/$REPO_NAME/$BRANCH_NAME/$RUN_ID/"
          echo "=================="

          # Robust copy: copy contents to avoid nested folders
          gsutil -m cp -r outputs/* "gs://${GCS_BUCKET}/raw/$REPO_NAME/$BRANCH_NAME/$RUN_ID/"
          gsutil -m cp -r normalized/* "gs://${GCS_BUCKET}/normalized/$REPO_NAME/$BRANCH_NAME/$RUN_ID/"
          gsutil -m cp -r correlated/* "gs://${GCS_BUCKET}/correlated/$REPO_NAME/$BRANCH_NAME/$RUN_ID/"
          
          echo "=== VERIFICATION ==="
          gsutil ls "gs://${GCS_BUCKET}/raw/$REPO_NAME/$BRANCH_NAME/$RUN_ID/" || echo "Failed to list raw"

          gsutil ls "gs://${GCS_BUCKET}/normalized/$REPO_NAME/$BRANCH_NAME/$RUN_ID/" || echo "Failed to list normalized"

  load_to_bigquery:
    name: Load to BigQuery

passed_checks.check_name: Suspicious use of netcat with IP address

steps.name: Load into BigQuery
steps.run:
if bq ls "${GCP_PROJECT_ID}:${BQ_DATASET}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "Dataset already exists: ${BQ_DATASET}"
else
  echo "Creating dataset: ${BQ_DATASET}"
  bq --location=US mk --dataset "${GCP_PROJECT_ID}:${BQ_DATASET}"
fi

# Use direct paths as requested, avoiding wildcards to minimize permission requirements
FINDINGS_GCS="gs://${GCS_BUCKET}/normalized/$REPO_NAME/$BRANCH_NAME/$RUN_ID/${TARGET_REPO_NAME}/findings.jsonl"
INCIDENTS_GCS="gs://${GCS_BUCKET}/correlated/$REPO_NAME/$BRANCH_NAME/$RUN_ID/${TARGET_REPO_NAME}/incidents.jsonl"


HAS_FINDINGS=false
if gsutil ls "$FINDINGS_GCS" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  HAS_FINDINGS=true
  echo "Found findings in GCS: $FINDINGS_GCS"
fi

HAS_INCIDENTS=false
if gsutil ls "$INCIDENTS_GCS" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  HAS_INCIDENTS=true
  echo "Found incidents in GCS: $INCIDENTS_GCS"
fi

if [ "$HAS_FINDINGS" = "false" ] && [ "$HAS_INCIDENTS" = "false" ]; then
  echo "Skipping ${TARGET_REPO_NAME}: no findings or incidents found at direct paths in GCS"
  echo "skipped=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
  exit 0
fi

echo "skipped=false" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
echo "Processing BigQuery load for ${TARGET_REPO_NAME}"

# Clean repo name for valid BQ table suffix (replace hyphens with underscores)
STAGING_SUFFIX=$(echo "${TARGET_REPO_NAME}" | tr '-' '_')

if [ "$HAS_FINDINGS" = "true" ]; then
  bq load \
    --replace \
    --source_format=NEWLINE_DELIMITED_JSON \
    --autodetect \
    "${GCP_PROJECT_ID}:${BQ_DATASET}.findings_normalized_staging_${STAGING_SUFFIX}" \
    "$FINDINGS_GCS"
fi

if [ "$HAS_INCIDENTS" = "true" ]; then
  bq load \
    --replace \
    --source_format=NEWLINE_DELIMITED_JSON \
    --autodetect \
    "${GCP_PROJECT_ID}:${BQ_DATASET}.incidents_staging_${STAGING_SUFFIX}" \
    "$INCIDENTS_GCS"
fi

# Ensure target tables exist
bq query --use_legacy_sql=false "
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS \
  \`${GCP_PROJECT_ID}.${BQ_DATASET}.findings_normalized\` ( \
    finding_id STRING, tool STRING, tool_finding_id STRING, category STRING, subcategory STRING, \
    severity STRING, confidence STRING, title STRING, description STRING, recommendation STRING, \
    rule_id STRING, rule_name STRING, file_path STRING, line_start INT64, line_end INT64, \
    code_snippet STRING, resource_type STRING, resource_name STRING, resource_namespace STRING, \
    package_name STRING, installed_version STRING, fixed_version STRING, secret_type STRING, \
    vulnerability_id STRING, repo STRING, branch STRING, commit_sha STRING, pipeline_id INT64, \
    scanner_stage STRING, timestamp TIMESTAMP, status STRING, environment STRING, raw_ref STRING, \
    raw_tool STRING, raw_severity STRING, normalized_version STRING, tags STRING, references STRING, \
    mitre_technique STRING, compliance_controls STRING, first_seen_at TIMESTAMP, last_seen_at TIMESTAMP, \
    first_seen_pipeline_id INT64, last_seen_pipeline_id INT64, first_seen_commit_sha STRING, \
    last_seen_commit_sha STRING, first_seen_branch STRING, last_seen_branch STRING, seen_count INT64 \
  )
"

bq query --use_legacy_sql=false "
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS \
  \`${GCP_PROJECT_ID}.${BQ_DATASET}.incidents\` ( \
    incident_id STRING, repo STRING, branch STRING, commit_sha STRING, pipeline_id INT64, \
    timestamp TIMESTAMP, summary STRING, title STRING, severity STRING, risk_score INT64, \
    confidence STRING, categories STRING, mitre_techniques STRING, related_findings STRING, \
    finding_count INT64, primary_resource STRING, recommended_action STRING, status STRING, \
    normalized_version STRING, first_seen_at TIMESTAMP, last_seen_at TIMESTAMP, \
    first_seen_pipeline_id INT64, last_seen_pipeline_id INT64, first_seen_commit_sha STRING, \
    last_seen_commit_sha STRING, first_seen_branch STRING, last_seen_branch STRING, seen_count INT64 \
  )
"

bq query --use_legacy_sql=false "
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS \
  \`${GCP_PROJECT_ID}.${BQ_DATASET}.finding_observations\` ( \
    finding_id STRING, repo STRING, branch STRING, commit_sha STRING, pipeline_id INT64, \
    loaded_at TIMESTAMP, observed_at TIMESTAMP, severity STRING, category STRING, tool STRING, status STRING \
  ) PARTITION BY DATE(loaded_at)
"

bq query --use_legacy_sql=false "
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS \
  \`${GCP_PROJECT_ID}.${BQ_DATASET}.incident_observations\` ( \
    incident_id STRING, repo STRING, branch STRING, commit_sha STRING, pipeline_id INT64, \
    loaded_at TIMESTAMP, observed_at TIMESTAMP, severity STRING, risk_score INT64, status STRING \
  ) PARTITION BY DATE(loaded_at)
"

if [ "$HAS_FINDINGS" = "true" ]; then
  bq query --use_legacy_sql=false "
  MERGE \`${GCP_PROJECT_ID}.${BQ_DATASET}.findings_normalized\` T \
  USING (SELECT S.*, SAFE_CAST(S.pipeline_id AS INT64) AS pipeline_id_int, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS loaded_at \
         FROM \`${GCP_PROJECT_ID}.${BQ_DATASET}.findings_normalized_staging_${STAGING_SUFFIX}\` S) S \
  ON T.finding_id = S.finding_id \
  WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET \
    tool = S.tool, tool_finding_id = S.tool_finding_id, category = S.category, \
    subcategory = S.subcategory, severity = S.severity, confidence = S.confidence, \
    title = S.title, description = S.description, recommendation = S.recommendation, \
    rule_id = S.rule_id, rule_name = S.rule_name, file_path = S.file_path, \
    line_start = S.line_start, line_end = S.line_end, code_snippet = S.code_snippet, \
    resource_type = S.resource_type, resource_name = S.resource_name, \
    resource_namespace = S.resource_namespace, package_name = S.package_name, \
    installed_version = S.installed_version, fixed_version = S.fixed_version, \
    secret_type = S.secret_type, vulnerability_id = S.vulnerability_id, \
    repo = S.repo, branch = S.branch, commit_sha = S.commit_sha, \
    pipeline_id = S.pipeline_id_int, scanner_stage = S.scanner_stage, timestamp = S.timestamp, \
    status = S.status, environment = S.environment, raw_ref = S.raw_ref, \
    raw_tool = S.raw_tool, raw_severity = S.raw_severity, normalized_version = S.normalized_version, \
    tags = TO_JSON_STRING(S.tags), references = TO_JSON_STRING(S.references), mitre_technique = S.mitre_technique, \
    compliance_controls = TO_JSON_STRING(S.compliance_controls), last_seen_at = S.loaded_at, \
    last_seen_pipeline_id = S.pipeline_id_int, last_seen_commit_sha = S.commit_sha, \
    last_seen_branch = S.branch, seen_count = COALESCE(T.seen_count, 0) + 1 \
  WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( \
    finding_id, tool, tool_finding_id, category, subcategory, severity, confidence, title, \
    description, recommendation, rule_id, rule_name, file_path, line_start, line_end, \
    code_snippet, resource_type, resource_name, resource_namespace, package_name, \
    installed_version, fixed_version, secret_type, vulnerability_id, repo, branch, \
    commit_sha, pipeline_id, scanner_stage, timestamp, status, environment, raw_ref, \
    raw_tool, raw_severity, normalized_version, tags, references, mitre_technique, \
    compliance_controls, first_seen_at, last_seen_at, first_seen_pipeline_id, \
    last_seen_pipeline_id, first_seen_commit_sha, last_seen_commit_sha, first_seen_branch, \
    last_seen_branch, seen_count ) VALUES ( \
    S.finding_id, S.tool, S.tool_finding_id, S.category, S.subcategory, S.severity, \
    S.confidence, S.title, S.description, S.recommendation, S.rule_id, S.rule_name, \
    S.file_path, S.line_start, S.line_end, S.code_snippet, S.resource_type, \
    S.resource_name, S.resource_namespace, S.package_name, S.installed_version, \
    S.fixed_version, S.secret_type, S.vulnerability_id, S.repo, S.branch, \
    S.commit_sha, S.pipeline_id_int, S.scanner_stage, S.timestamp, S.status, \
    S.environment, S.raw_ref, S.raw_tool, S.raw_severity, S.normalized_version, \
    TO_JSON_STRING(S.tags), TO_JSON_STRING(S.references), S.mitre_technique, TO_JSON_STRING(S.compliance_controls), S.loaded_at, \
    S.loaded_at, S.pipeline_id_int, S.pipeline_id_int, S.commit_sha, S.commit_sha, \
    S.branch, S.branch, 1 )
  "

  bq query --use_legacy_sql=false "
  MERGE \`${GCP_PROJECT_ID}.${BQ_DATASET}.finding_observations\` T \
  USING (SELECT finding_id, repo, branch, commit_sha, SAFE_CAST(pipeline_id AS INT64) AS pipeline_id, \
           CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS loaded_at, timestamp AS observed_at, severity, category, tool, status \
         FROM \`${GCP_PROJECT_ID}.${BQ_DATASET}.findings_normalized_staging_${STAGING_SUFFIX}\`) S \
  ON T.finding_id = S.finding_id AND T.pipeline_id = S.pipeline_id \
  WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( \
    finding_id, repo, branch, commit_sha, pipeline_id, loaded_at, observed_at, severity, category, tool, status \
  ) VALUES ( \
    S.finding_id, S.repo, S.branch, S.commit_sha, S.pipeline_id, S.loaded_at, S.observed_at, \
    S.severity, S.category, S.tool, S.status )
  "
fi

if [ "$HAS_INCIDENTS" = "true" ]; then
  bq query --use_legacy_sql=false "
  MERGE \`${GCP_PROJECT_ID}.${BQ_DATASET}.incidents\` T \
  USING (SELECT S.*, SAFE_CAST(S.pipeline_id AS INT64) AS pipeline_id_int, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS loaded_at \
         FROM \`${GCP_PROJECT_ID}.${BQ_DATASET}.incidents_staging_${STAGING_SUFFIX}\` S) S \
  ON T.incident_id = S.incident_id \
  WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET \
    repo = S.repo, branch = S.branch, commit_sha = S.commit_sha, \
    pipeline_id = S.pipeline_id_int, timestamp = S.timestamp, summary = S.summary, \
    title = S.title, severity = S.severity, risk_score = S.risk_score, confidence = S.confidence, \
    categories = TO_JSON_STRING(S.categories), mitre_techniques = TO_JSON_STRING(S.mitre_techniques), \
    related_findings = TO_JSON_STRING(S.related_findings), finding_count = S.finding_count, \
    primary_resource = S.primary_resource, recommended_action = S.recommended_action, \
    status = S.status, normalized_version = S.normalized_version, \
    last_seen_at = S.loaded_at, last_seen_pipeline_id = S.pipeline_id_int, \
    last_seen_commit_sha = S.commit_sha, last_seen_branch = S.branch, \
    seen_count = COALESCE(T.seen_count, 0) + 1 \
  WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( \
    incident_id, repo, branch, commit_sha, pipeline_id, timestamp, summary, title, \
    severity, risk_score, confidence, categories, mitre_techniques, related_findings, \
    finding_count, primary_resource, recommended_action, status, normalized_version, \
    first_seen_at, last_seen_at, first_seen_pipeline_id, last_seen_pipeline_id, \
    first_seen_commit_sha, last_seen_commit_sha, first_seen_branch, last_seen_branch, \
    seen_count ) VALUES ( \
    S.incident_id, S.repo, S.branch, S.commit_sha, S.pipeline_id_int, S.timestamp, \
    S.summary, S.title, S.severity, S.risk_score, S.confidence, TO_JSON_STRING(S.categories), \
    TO_JSON_STRING(S.mitre_techniques), TO_JSON_STRING(S.related_findings), S.finding_count, S.primary_resource, \
    S.recommended_action, S.status, S.normalized_version, S.loaded_at, S.loaded_at, \
    S.pipeline_id_int, S.pipeline_id_int, S.commit_sha, S.commit_sha, S.branch, \
    S.branch, 1 )
  "

  bq query --use_legacy_sql=false "
  MERGE \`${GCP_PROJECT_ID}.${BQ_DATASET}.incident_observations\` T \
  USING (SELECT incident_id, repo, branch, commit_sha, SAFE_CAST(pipeline_id AS INT64) AS pipeline_id, \
           CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS loaded_at, timestamp AS observed_at, severity, risk_score, status \
         FROM \`${GCP_PROJECT_ID}.${BQ_DATASET}.incidents_staging_${STAGING_SUFFIX}\`) S \
  ON T.incident_id = S.incident_id AND T.pipeline_id = S.pipeline_id \
  WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( \
    incident_id, repo, branch, commit_sha, pipeline_id, loaded_at, observed_at, severity, risk_score, status \
  ) VALUES ( \
    S.incident_id, S.repo, S.branch, S.commit_sha, S.pipeline_id, S.loaded_at, S.observed_at, \
    S.severity, S.risk_score, S.status )
  "
fi

# Clean up temporary staging tables
bq rm -f -t "${GCP_PROJECT_ID}:${BQ_DATASET}.findings_normalized_staging_${STAGING_SUFFIX}" || true
bq rm -f -t "${GCP_PROJECT_ID}:${BQ_DATASET}.incidents_staging_${STAGING_SUFFIX}" || true

steps.name: Verify BigQuery tables
steps.run:
bq show "${GCP_PROJECT_ID}:${BQ_DATASET}.findings_normalized"
bq show "${GCP_PROJECT_ID}:${BQ_DATASET}.incidents"

code_block:
name: Load to BigQuery
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: export_to_gcs
    outputs:
      skipped: ${{ steps.load.outputs.skipped }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout PipelineGuard
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          repository: CLUE-BDI/pipelineguard
          token: ${{ secrets.PIPELINEGUARD_PAT }}

      - name: Checkout target repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          repository: ${{ inputs.target_repository || github.repository }}
          token: ${{ secrets.PIPELINEGUARD_PAT }}
          path: ${{ inputs.target_repo_path }}

      - name: Authenticate to Google Cloud
        uses: google-github-actions/auth@v2
        with:
          credentials_json: ${{ secrets.GCP_CREDENTIALS || secrets.GCP_SA_KEY_JSON }}

      - name: Setup gcloud
        uses: google-github-actions/setup-gcloud@v2

      - name: Load into BigQuery
        id: load
        env:
          TARGET_REPO_NAME: ${{ inputs.target_repo_name }}
          REPO_NAME: ${{ github.event.repository.name }}
          BRANCH_NAME: ${{ github.ref_name }}
          RUN_ID: ${{ github.run_id }}
        run: |
          if bq ls "${GCP_PROJECT_ID}:${BQ_DATASET}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            echo "Dataset already exists: ${BQ_DATASET}"
          else
            echo "Creating dataset: ${BQ_DATASET}"
            bq --location=US mk --dataset "${GCP_PROJECT_ID}:${BQ_DATASET}"
          fi

          # Use direct paths as requested, avoiding wildcards to minimize permission requirements
          FINDINGS_GCS="gs://${GCS_BUCKET}/normalized/$REPO_NAME/$BRANCH_NAME/$RUN_ID/${TARGET_REPO_NAME}/findings.jsonl"
          INCIDENTS_GCS="gs://${GCS_BUCKET}/correlated/$REPO_NAME/$BRANCH_NAME/$RUN_ID/${TARGET_REPO_NAME}/incidents.jsonl"


          HAS_FINDINGS=false
          if gsutil ls "$FINDINGS_GCS" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            HAS_FINDINGS=true
            echo "Found findings in GCS: $FINDINGS_GCS"
          fi

          HAS_INCIDENTS=false
          if gsutil ls "$INCIDENTS_GCS" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            HAS_INCIDENTS=true
            echo "Found incidents in GCS: $INCIDENTS_GCS"
          fi

          if [ "$HAS_FINDINGS" = "false" ] && [ "$HAS_INCIDENTS" = "false" ]; then
            echo "Skipping ${TARGET_REPO_NAME}: no findings or incidents found at direct paths in GCS"
            echo "skipped=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            exit 0
          fi

          echo "skipped=false" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "Processing BigQuery load for ${TARGET_REPO_NAME}"

          # Clean repo name for valid BQ table suffix (replace hyphens with underscores)
          STAGING_SUFFIX=$(echo "${TARGET_REPO_NAME}" | tr '-' '_')

          if [ "$HAS_FINDINGS" = "true" ]; then
            bq load \
              --replace \
              --source_format=NEWLINE_DELIMITED_JSON \
              --autodetect \
              "${GCP_PROJECT_ID}:${BQ_DATASET}.findings_normalized_staging_${STAGING_SUFFIX}" \
              "$FINDINGS_GCS"
          fi

          if [ "$HAS_INCIDENTS" = "true" ]; then
            bq load \
              --replace \
              --source_format=NEWLINE_DELIMITED_JSON \
              --autodetect \
              "${GCP_PROJECT_ID}:${BQ_DATASET}.incidents_staging_${STAGING_SUFFIX}" \
              "$INCIDENTS_GCS"
          fi

          # Ensure target tables exist
          bq query --use_legacy_sql=false "
          CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS \
            \`${GCP_PROJECT_ID}.${BQ_DATASET}.findings_normalized\` ( \
              finding_id STRING, tool STRING, tool_finding_id STRING, category STRING, subcategory STRING, \
              severity STRING, confidence STRING, title STRING, description STRING, recommendation STRING, \
              rule_id STRING, rule_name STRING, file_path STRING, line_start INT64, line_end INT64, \
              code_snippet STRING, resource_type STRING, resource_name STRING, resource_namespace STRING, \
              package_name STRING, installed_version STRING, fixed_version STRING, secret_type STRING, \
              vulnerability_id STRING, repo STRING, branch STRING, commit_sha STRING, pipeline_id INT64, \
              scanner_stage STRING, timestamp TIMESTAMP, status STRING, environment STRING, raw_ref STRING, \
              raw_tool STRING, raw_severity STRING, normalized_version STRING, tags STRING, references STRING, \
              mitre_technique STRING, compliance_controls STRING, first_seen_at TIMESTAMP, last_seen_at TIMESTAMP, \
              first_seen_pipeline_id INT64, last_seen_pipeline_id INT64, first_seen_commit_sha STRING, \
              last_seen_commit_sha STRING, first_seen_branch STRING, last_seen_branch STRING, seen_count INT64 \
            )
          "

          bq query --use_legacy_sql=false "
          CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS \
            \`${GCP_PROJECT_ID}.${BQ_DATASET}.incidents\` ( \
              incident_id STRING, repo STRING, branch STRING, commit_sha STRING, pipeline_id INT64, \
              timestamp TIMESTAMP, summary STRING, title STRING, severity STRING, risk_score INT64, \
              confidence STRING, categories STRING, mitre_techniques STRING, related_findings STRING, \
              finding_count INT64, primary_resource STRING, recommended_action STRING, status STRING, \
              normalized_version STRING, first_seen_at TIMESTAMP, last_seen_at TIMESTAMP, \
              first_seen_pipeline_id INT64, last_seen_pipeline_id INT64, first_seen_commit_sha STRING, \
              last_seen_commit_sha STRING, first_seen_branch STRING, last_seen_branch STRING, seen_count INT64 \
            )
          "

          bq query --use_legacy_sql=false "
          CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS \
            \`${GCP_PROJECT_ID}.${BQ_DATASET}.finding_observations\` ( \
              finding_id STRING, repo STRING, branch STRING, commit_sha STRING, pipeline_id INT64, \
              loaded_at TIMESTAMP, observed_at TIMESTAMP, severity STRING, category STRING, tool STRING, status STRING \
            ) PARTITION BY DATE(loaded_at)
          "

          bq query --use_legacy_sql=false "
          CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS \
            \`${GCP_PROJECT_ID}.${BQ_DATASET}.incident_observations\` ( \
              incident_id STRING, repo STRING, branch STRING, commit_sha STRING, pipeline_id INT64, \
              loaded_at TIMESTAMP, observed_at TIMESTAMP, severity STRING, risk_score INT64, status STRING \
            ) PARTITION BY DATE(loaded_at)
          "

          if [ "$HAS_FINDINGS" = "true" ]; then
            bq query --use_legacy_sql=false "
            MERGE \`${GCP_PROJECT_ID}.${BQ_DATASET}.findings_normalized\` T \
            USING (SELECT S.*, SAFE_CAST(S.pipeline_id AS INT64) AS pipeline_id_int, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS loaded_at \
                   FROM \`${GCP_PROJECT_ID}.${BQ_DATASET}.findings_normalized_staging_${STAGING_SUFFIX}\` S) S \
            ON T.finding_id = S.finding_id \
            WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET \
              tool = S.tool, tool_finding_id = S.tool_finding_id, category = S.category, \
              subcategory = S.subcategory, severity = S.severity, confidence = S.confidence, \
              title = S.title, description = S.description, recommendation = S.recommendation, \
              rule_id = S.rule_id, rule_name = S.rule_name, file_path = S.file_path, \
              line_start = S.line_start, line_end = S.line_end, code_snippet = S.code_snippet, \
              resource_type = S.resource_type, resource_name = S.resource_name, \
              resource_namespace = S.resource_namespace, package_name = S.package_name, \
              installed_version = S.installed_version, fixed_version = S.fixed_version, \
              secret_type = S.secret_type, vulnerability_id = S.vulnerability_id, \
              repo = S.repo, branch = S.branch, commit_sha = S.commit_sha, \
              pipeline_id = S.pipeline_id_int, scanner_stage = S.scanner_stage, timestamp = S.timestamp, \
              status = S.status, environment = S.environment, raw_ref = S.raw_ref, \
              raw_tool = S.raw_tool, raw_severity = S.raw_severity, normalized_version = S.normalized_version, \
              tags = TO_JSON_STRING(S.tags), references = TO_JSON_STRING(S.references), mitre_technique = S.mitre_technique, \
              compliance_controls = TO_JSON_STRING(S.compliance_controls), last_seen_at = S.loaded_at, \
              last_seen_pipeline_id = S.pipeline_id_int, last_seen_commit_sha = S.commit_sha, \
              last_seen_branch = S.branch, seen_count = COALESCE(T.seen_count, 0) + 1 \
            WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( \
              finding_id, tool, tool_finding_id, category, subcategory, severity, confidence, title, \
              description, recommendation, rule_id, rule_name, file_path, line_start, line_end, \
              code_snippet, resource_type, resource_name, resource_namespace, package_name, \
              installed_version, fixed_version, secret_type, vulnerability_id, repo, branch, \
              commit_sha, pipeline_id, scanner_stage, timestamp, status, environment, raw_ref, \
              raw_tool, raw_severity, normalized_version, tags, references, mitre_technique, \
              compliance_controls, first_seen_at, last_seen_at, first_seen_pipeline_id, \
              last_seen_pipeline_id, first_seen_commit_sha, last_seen_commit_sha, first_seen_branch, \
              last_seen_branch, seen_count ) VALUES ( \
              S.finding_id, S.tool, S.tool_finding_id, S.category, S.subcategory, S.severity, \
              S.confidence, S.title, S.description, S.recommendation, S.rule_id, S.rule_name, \
              S.file_path, S.line_start, S.line_end, S.code_snippet, S.resource_type, \
              S.resource_name, S.resource_namespace, S.package_name, S.installed_version, \
              S.fixed_version, S.secret_type, S.vulnerability_id, S.repo, S.branch, \
              S.commit_sha, S.pipeline_id_int, S.scanner_stage, S.timestamp, S.status, \
              S.environment, S.raw_ref, S.raw_tool, S.raw_severity, S.normalized_version, \
              TO_JSON_STRING(S.tags), TO_JSON_STRING(S.references), S.mitre_technique, TO_JSON_STRING(S.compliance_controls), S.loaded_at, \
              S.loaded_at, S.pipeline_id_int, S.pipeline_id_int, S.commit_sha, S.commit_sha, \
              S.branch, S.branch, 1 )
            "

            bq query --use_legacy_sql=false "
            MERGE \`${GCP_PROJECT_ID}.${BQ_DATASET}.finding_observations\` T \
            USING (SELECT finding_id, repo, branch, commit_sha, SAFE_CAST(pipeline_id AS INT64) AS pipeline_id, \
                     CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS loaded_at, timestamp AS observed_at, severity, category, tool, status \
                   FROM \`${GCP_PROJECT_ID}.${BQ_DATASET}.findings_normalized_staging_${STAGING_SUFFIX}\`) S \
            ON T.finding_id = S.finding_id AND T.pipeline_id = S.pipeline_id \
            WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( \
              finding_id, repo, branch, commit_sha, pipeline_id, loaded_at, observed_at, severity, category, tool, status \
            ) VALUES ( \
              S.finding_id, S.repo, S.branch, S.commit_sha, S.pipeline_id, S.loaded_at, S.observed_at, \
              S.severity, S.category, S.tool, S.status )
            "
          fi

          if [ "$HAS_INCIDENTS" = "true" ]; then
            bq query --use_legacy_sql=false "
            MERGE \`${GCP_PROJECT_ID}.${BQ_DATASET}.incidents\` T \
            USING (SELECT S.*, SAFE_CAST(S.pipeline_id AS INT64) AS pipeline_id_int, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS loaded_at \
                   FROM \`${GCP_PROJECT_ID}.${BQ_DATASET}.incidents_staging_${STAGING_SUFFIX}\` S) S \
            ON T.incident_id = S.incident_id \
            WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET \
              repo = S.repo, branch = S.branch, commit_sha = S.commit_sha, \
              pipeline_id = S.pipeline_id_int, timestamp = S.timestamp, summary = S.summary, \
              title = S.title, severity = S.severity, risk_score = S.risk_score, confidence = S.confidence, \
              categories = TO_JSON_STRING(S.categories), mitre_techniques = TO_JSON_STRING(S.mitre_techniques), \
              related_findings = TO_JSON_STRING(S.related_findings), finding_count = S.finding_count, \
              primary_resource = S.primary_resource, recommended_action = S.recommended_action, \
              status = S.status, normalized_version = S.normalized_version, \
              last_seen_at = S.loaded_at, last_seen_pipeline_id = S.pipeline_id_int, \
              last_seen_commit_sha = S.commit_sha, last_seen_branch = S.branch, \
              seen_count = COALESCE(T.seen_count, 0) + 1 \
            WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( \
              incident_id, repo, branch, commit_sha, pipeline_id, timestamp, summary, title, \
              severity, risk_score, confidence, categories, mitre_techniques, related_findings, \
              finding_count, primary_resource, recommended_action, status, normalized_version, \
              first_seen_at, last_seen_at, first_seen_pipeline_id, last_seen_pipeline_id, \
              first_seen_commit_sha, last_seen_commit_sha, first_seen_branch, last_seen_branch, \
              seen_count ) VALUES ( \
              S.incident_id, S.repo, S.branch, S.commit_sha, S.pipeline_id_int, S.timestamp, \
              S.summary, S.title, S.severity, S.risk_score, S.confidence, TO_JSON_STRING(S.categories), \
              TO_JSON_STRING(S.mitre_techniques), TO_JSON_STRING(S.related_findings), S.finding_count, S.primary_resource, \
              S.recommended_action, S.status, S.normalized_version, S.loaded_at, S.loaded_at, \
              S.pipeline_id_int, S.pipeline_id_int, S.commit_sha, S.commit_sha, S.branch, \
              S.branch, 1 )
            "

            bq query --use_legacy_sql=false "
            MERGE \`${GCP_PROJECT_ID}.${BQ_DATASET}.incident_observations\` T \
            USING (SELECT incident_id, repo, branch, commit_sha, SAFE_CAST(pipeline_id AS INT64) AS pipeline_id, \
                     CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS loaded_at, timestamp AS observed_at, severity, risk_score, status \
                   FROM \`${GCP_PROJECT_ID}.${BQ_DATASET}.incidents_staging_${STAGING_SUFFIX}\`) S \
            ON T.incident_id = S.incident_id AND T.pipeline_id = S.pipeline_id \
            WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( \
              incident_id, repo, branch, commit_sha, pipeline_id, loaded_at, observed_at, severity, risk_score, status \
            ) VALUES ( \
              S.incident_id, S.repo, S.branch, S.commit_sha, S.pipeline_id, S.loaded_at, S.observed_at, \
              S.severity, S.risk_score, S.status )
            "
          fi

          # Clean up temporary staging tables
          bq rm -f -t "${GCP_PROJECT_ID}:${BQ_DATASET}.findings_normalized_staging_${STAGING_SUFFIX}" || true
          bq rm -f -t "${GCP_PROJECT_ID}:${BQ_DATASET}.incidents_staging_${STAGING_SUFFIX}" || true

      - name: Verify BigQuery tables
        if: steps.load.outputs.skipped != 'true'
        run: |
          bq show "${GCP_PROJECT_ID}:${BQ_DATASET}.findings_normalized"
          bq show "${GCP_PROJECT_ID}:${BQ_DATASET}.incidents"

  create_bigquery_views:
    name: Create BigQuery views

passed_checks.check_name: Suspicious use of netcat with IP address

steps.name: Install gettext
steps.run: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y gettext-base

steps.name: Create BigQuery views
steps.run:
if ! bq show "${GCP_PROJECT_ID}:${BQ_DATASET}.findings_normalized" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "Missing table: ${GCP_PROJECT_ID}:${BQ_DATASET}.findings_normalized"
  exit 1
fi
if ! bq show "${GCP_PROJECT_ID}:${BQ_DATASET}.incidents" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "Missing table: ${GCP_PROJECT_ID}:${BQ_DATASET}.incidents"
  exit 1
fi
for f in sql/views/*.sql; do
  echo "Applying $f"
  envsubst < "$f" | bq query --use_legacy_sql=false
done

code_block:
name: Create BigQuery views
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: load_to_bigquery
    if: needs.load_to_bigquery.outputs.skipped != 'true'
    steps:
      - name: Checkout PipelineGuard
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          repository: CLUE-BDI/pipelineguard
          token: ${{ secrets.PIPELINEGUARD_PAT }}

      - name: Checkout target repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          repository: ${{ inputs.target_repository || github.repository }}
          token: ${{ secrets.PIPELINEGUARD_PAT }}
          path: ${{ inputs.target_repo_path }}

      - name: Authenticate to Google Cloud
        uses: google-github-actions/auth@v2
        with:
          credentials_json: ${{ secrets.GCP_CREDENTIALS || secrets.GCP_SA_KEY_JSON }}

      - name: Setup gcloud
        uses: google-github-actions/setup-gcloud@v2

      - name: Install gettext
        run: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y gettext-base

      - name: Create BigQuery views
        run: |
          if ! bq show "${GCP_PROJECT_ID}:${BQ_DATASET}.findings_normalized" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            echo "Missing table: ${GCP_PROJECT_ID}:${BQ_DATASET}.findings_normalized"
            exit 1
          fi
          if ! bq show "${GCP_PROJECT_ID}:${BQ_DATASET}.incidents" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            echo "Missing table: ${GCP_PROJECT_ID}:${BQ_DATASET}.incidents"
            exit 1
          fi
          for f in sql/views/*.sql; do
            echo "Applying $f"
            envsubst < "$f" | bq query --use_legacy_sql=false
          done

name: Publish artifacts
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs:
      - validate_findings
      - threshold_check
      - validate_correlation
    steps:
      - name: Checkout PipelineGuard
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          repository: CLUE-BDI/pipelineguard
          token: ${{ secrets.PIPELINEGUARD_PAT }}

      - name: Checkout target repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          repository: ${{ inputs.target_repository || github.repository }}
          token: ${{ secrets.PIPELINEGUARD_PAT }}
          path: ${{ inputs.target_repo_path }}

      - name: Download validate findings artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: validate-findings-${{ inputs.target_repo_name }}
          path: artifacts

      - name: Merge artifacts into published directories
        run: |
          mkdir -p outputs normalized correlated
          if [ -d "artifacts/outputs" ]; then
            cp -r artifacts/outputs/* outputs/ || true
          fi
          if [ -d "artifacts/normalized" ]; then
            cp -r artifacts/normalized/* normalized/ || true
          fi
          if [ -d "artifacts/correlated" ]; then
            cp -r artifacts/correlated/* correlated/ || true
          fi

      - name: List output artifacts
        run: |
          find outputs normalized correlated -maxdepth 4 -type f | sort

      - name: Upload published artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: published-artifacts-${{ inputs.target_repo_name }}
          path: |
            outputs
            normalized
            correlated

  export_to_gcs:
    name: Export to GCS

passed_checks.check_name: Ensure ACTIONS_ALLOW_UNSECURE_COMMANDS isn't true on environment variables

steps.name: Copy artifacts to GCS
steps.run:
echo "=== DEBUG INFO ==="
echo "Target Bucket: ${GCS_BUCKET}"
echo "Repo Name: $REPO_NAME"
echo "Branch: $BRANCH_NAME"
echo "Run ID: $RUN_ID"
echo "Raw Path: gs://${GCS_BUCKET}/raw/$REPO_NAME/$BRANCH_NAME/$RUN_ID/"
echo "=================="

# Robust copy: copy contents to avoid nested folders
gsutil -m cp -r outputs/* "gs://${GCS_BUCKET}/raw/$REPO_NAME/$BRANCH_NAME/$RUN_ID/"
gsutil -m cp -r normalized/* "gs://${GCS_BUCKET}/normalized/$REPO_NAME/$BRANCH_NAME/$RUN_ID/"
gsutil -m cp -r correlated/* "gs://${GCS_BUCKET}/correlated/$REPO_NAME/$BRANCH_NAME/$RUN_ID/"

echo "=== VERIFICATION ==="
gsutil ls "gs://${GCS_BUCKET}/raw/$REPO_NAME/$BRANCH_NAME/$RUN_ID/" || echo "Failed to list raw"

gsutil ls "gs://${GCS_BUCKET}/normalized/$REPO_NAME/$BRANCH_NAME/$RUN_ID/" || echo "Failed to list normalized"

code_block:
name: Export to GCS
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: publish_artifacts
    steps:
      - name: Checkout PipelineGuard
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          repository: CLUE-BDI/pipelineguard
          token: ${{ secrets.PIPELINEGUARD_PAT }}

      - name: Checkout target repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          repository: ${{ inputs.target_repository || github.repository }}
          token: ${{ secrets.PIPELINEGUARD_PAT }}
          path: ${{ inputs.target_repo_path }}

      - name: Download published artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: published-artifacts-${{ inputs.target_repo_name }}
          path: .

      - name: Authenticate to Google Cloud
        uses: google-github-actions/auth@v2
        with:
          credentials_json: ${{ secrets.GCP_CREDENTIALS || secrets.GCP_SA_KEY_JSON }}

      - name: Setup gcloud
        uses: google-github-actions/setup-gcloud@v2

      - name: Copy artifacts to GCS
        env:
          REPO_NAME: ${{ github.event.repository.name }}
          BRANCH_NAME: ${{ github.ref_name }}
          RUN_ID: ${{ github.run_id }}
        run: |
          echo "=== DEBUG INFO ==="
          echo "Target Bucket: ${GCS_BUCKET}"
          echo "Repo Name: $REPO_NAME"
          echo "Branch: $BRANCH_NAME"
          echo "Run ID: $RUN_ID"
          echo "Raw Path: gs://${GCS_BUCKET}/raw/$REPO_NAME/$BRANCH_NAME/$RUN_ID/"
          echo "=================="

          # Robust copy: copy contents to avoid nested folders
          gsutil -m cp -r outputs/* "gs://${GCS_BUCKET}/raw/$REPO_NAME/$BRANCH_NAME/$RUN_ID/"
          gsutil -m cp -r normalized/* "gs://${GCS_BUCKET}/normalized/$REPO_NAME/$BRANCH_NAME/$RUN_ID/"
          gsutil -m cp -r correlated/* "gs://${GCS_BUCKET}/correlated/$REPO_NAME/$BRANCH_NAME/$RUN_ID/"
          
          echo "=== VERIFICATION ==="
          gsutil ls "gs://${GCS_BUCKET}/raw/$REPO_NAME/$BRANCH_NAME/$RUN_ID/" || echo "Failed to list raw"

          gsutil ls "gs://${GCS_BUCKET}/normalized/$REPO_NAME/$BRANCH_NAME/$RUN_ID/" || echo "Failed to list normalized"

  load_to_bigquery:
    name: Load to BigQuery

passed_checks.check_name: Ensure ACTIONS_ALLOW_UNSECURE_COMMANDS isn't true on environment variables

steps.name: Load into BigQuery
steps.run:
if bq ls "${GCP_PROJECT_ID}:${BQ_DATASET}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "Dataset already exists: ${BQ_DATASET}"
else
  echo "Creating dataset: ${BQ_DATASET}"
  bq --location=US mk --dataset "${GCP_PROJECT_ID}:${BQ_DATASET}"
fi

# Use direct paths as requested, avoiding wildcards to minimize permission requirements
FINDINGS_GCS="gs://${GCS_BUCKET}/normalized/$REPO_NAME/$BRANCH_NAME/$RUN_ID/${TARGET_REPO_NAME}/findings.jsonl"
INCIDENTS_GCS="gs://${GCS_BUCKET}/correlated/$REPO_NAME/$BRANCH_NAME/$RUN_ID/${TARGET_REPO_NAME}/incidents.jsonl"


HAS_FINDINGS=false
if gsutil ls "$FINDINGS_GCS" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  HAS_FINDINGS=true
  echo "Found findings in GCS: $FINDINGS_GCS"
fi

HAS_INCIDENTS=false
if gsutil ls "$INCIDENTS_GCS" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  HAS_INCIDENTS=true
  echo "Found incidents in GCS: $INCIDENTS_GCS"
fi

if [ "$HAS_FINDINGS" = "false" ] && [ "$HAS_INCIDENTS" = "false" ]; then
  echo "Skipping ${TARGET_REPO_NAME}: no findings or incidents found at direct paths in GCS"
  echo "skipped=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
  exit 0
fi

echo "skipped=false" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
echo "Processing BigQuery load for ${TARGET_REPO_NAME}"

# Clean repo name for valid BQ table suffix (replace hyphens with underscores)
STAGING_SUFFIX=$(echo "${TARGET_REPO_NAME}" | tr '-' '_')

if [ "$HAS_FINDINGS" = "true" ]; then
  bq load \
    --replace \
    --source_format=NEWLINE_DELIMITED_JSON \
    --autodetect \
    "${GCP_PROJECT_ID}:${BQ_DATASET}.findings_normalized_staging_${STAGING_SUFFIX}" \
    "$FINDINGS_GCS"
fi

if [ "$HAS_INCIDENTS" = "true" ]; then
  bq load \
    --replace \
    --source_format=NEWLINE_DELIMITED_JSON \
    --autodetect \
    "${GCP_PROJECT_ID}:${BQ_DATASET}.incidents_staging_${STAGING_SUFFIX}" \
    "$INCIDENTS_GCS"
fi

# Ensure target tables exist
bq query --use_legacy_sql=false "
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS \
  \`${GCP_PROJECT_ID}.${BQ_DATASET}.findings_normalized\` ( \
    finding_id STRING, tool STRING, tool_finding_id STRING, category STRING, subcategory STRING, \
    severity STRING, confidence STRING, title STRING, description STRING, recommendation STRING, \
    rule_id STRING, rule_name STRING, file_path STRING, line_start INT64, line_end INT64, \
    code_snippet STRING, resource_type STRING, resource_name STRING, resource_namespace STRING, \
    package_name STRING, installed_version STRING, fixed_version STRING, secret_type STRING, \
    vulnerability_id STRING, repo STRING, branch STRING, commit_sha STRING, pipeline_id INT64, \
    scanner_stage STRING, timestamp TIMESTAMP, status STRING, environment STRING, raw_ref STRING, \
    raw_tool STRING, raw_severity STRING, normalized_version STRING, tags STRING, references STRING, \
    mitre_technique STRING, compliance_controls STRING, first_seen_at TIMESTAMP, last_seen_at TIMESTAMP, \
    first_seen_pipeline_id INT64, last_seen_pipeline_id INT64, first_seen_commit_sha STRING, \
    last_seen_commit_sha STRING, first_seen_branch STRING, last_seen_branch STRING, seen_count INT64 \
  )
"

bq query --use_legacy_sql=false "
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS \
  \`${GCP_PROJECT_ID}.${BQ_DATASET}.incidents\` ( \
    incident_id STRING, repo STRING, branch STRING, commit_sha STRING, pipeline_id INT64, \
    timestamp TIMESTAMP, summary STRING, title STRING, severity STRING, risk_score INT64, \
    confidence STRING, categories STRING, mitre_techniques STRING, related_findings STRING, \
    finding_count INT64, primary_resource STRING, recommended_action STRING, status STRING, \
    normalized_version STRING, first_seen_at TIMESTAMP, last_seen_at TIMESTAMP, \
    first_seen_pipeline_id INT64, last_seen_pipeline_id INT64, first_seen_commit_sha STRING, \
    last_seen_commit_sha STRING, first_seen_branch STRING, last_seen_branch STRING, seen_count INT64 \
  )
"

bq query --use_legacy_sql=false "
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS \
  \`${GCP_PROJECT_ID}.${BQ_DATASET}.finding_observations\` ( \
    finding_id STRING, repo STRING, branch STRING, commit_sha STRING, pipeline_id INT64, \
    loaded_at TIMESTAMP, observed_at TIMESTAMP, severity STRING, category STRING, tool STRING, status STRING \
  ) PARTITION BY DATE(loaded_at)
"

bq query --use_legacy_sql=false "
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS \
  \`${GCP_PROJECT_ID}.${BQ_DATASET}.incident_observations\` ( \
    incident_id STRING, repo STRING, branch STRING, commit_sha STRING, pipeline_id INT64, \
    loaded_at TIMESTAMP, observed_at TIMESTAMP, severity STRING, risk_score INT64, status STRING \
  ) PARTITION BY DATE(loaded_at)
"

if [ "$HAS_FINDINGS" = "true" ]; then
  bq query --use_legacy_sql=false "
  MERGE \`${GCP_PROJECT_ID}.${BQ_DATASET}.findings_normalized\` T \
  USING (SELECT S.*, SAFE_CAST(S.pipeline_id AS INT64) AS pipeline_id_int, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS loaded_at \
         FROM \`${GCP_PROJECT_ID}.${BQ_DATASET}.findings_normalized_staging_${STAGING_SUFFIX}\` S) S \
  ON T.finding_id = S.finding_id \
  WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET \
    tool = S.tool, tool_finding_id = S.tool_finding_id, category = S.category, \
    subcategory = S.subcategory, severity = S.severity, confidence = S.confidence, \
    title = S.title, description = S.description, recommendation = S.recommendation, \
    rule_id = S.rule_id, rule_name = S.rule_name, file_path = S.file_path, \
    line_start = S.line_start, line_end = S.line_end, code_snippet = S.code_snippet, \
    resource_type = S.resource_type, resource_name = S.resource_name, \
    resource_namespace = S.resource_namespace, package_name = S.package_name, \
    installed_version = S.installed_version, fixed_version = S.fixed_version, \
    secret_type = S.secret_type, vulnerability_id = S.vulnerability_id, \
    repo = S.repo, branch = S.branch, commit_sha = S.commit_sha, \
    pipeline_id = S.pipeline_id_int, scanner_stage = S.scanner_stage, timestamp = S.timestamp, \
    status = S.status, environment = S.environment, raw_ref = S.raw_ref, \
    raw_tool = S.raw_tool, raw_severity = S.raw_severity, normalized_version = S.normalized_version, \
    tags = TO_JSON_STRING(S.tags), references = TO_JSON_STRING(S.references), mitre_technique = S.mitre_technique, \
    compliance_controls = TO_JSON_STRING(S.compliance_controls), last_seen_at = S.loaded_at, \
    last_seen_pipeline_id = S.pipeline_id_int, last_seen_commit_sha = S.commit_sha, \
    last_seen_branch = S.branch, seen_count = COALESCE(T.seen_count, 0) + 1 \
  WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( \
    finding_id, tool, tool_finding_id, category, subcategory, severity, confidence, title, \
    description, recommendation, rule_id, rule_name, file_path, line_start, line_end, \
    code_snippet, resource_type, resource_name, resource_namespace, package_name, \
    installed_version, fixed_version, secret_type, vulnerability_id, repo, branch, \
    commit_sha, pipeline_id, scanner_stage, timestamp, status, environment, raw_ref, \
    raw_tool, raw_severity, normalized_version, tags, references, mitre_technique, \
    compliance_controls, first_seen_at, last_seen_at, first_seen_pipeline_id, \
    last_seen_pipeline_id, first_seen_commit_sha, last_seen_commit_sha, first_seen_branch, \
    last_seen_branch, seen_count ) VALUES ( \
    S.finding_id, S.tool, S.tool_finding_id, S.category, S.subcategory, S.severity, \
    S.confidence, S.title, S.description, S.recommendation, S.rule_id, S.rule_name, \
    S.file_path, S.line_start, S.line_end, S.code_snippet, S.resource_type, \
    S.resource_name, S.resource_namespace, S.package_name, S.installed_version, \
    S.fixed_version, S.secret_type, S.vulnerability_id, S.repo, S.branch, \
    S.commit_sha, S.pipeline_id_int, S.scanner_stage, S.timestamp, S.status, \
    S.environment, S.raw_ref, S.raw_tool, S.raw_severity, S.normalized_version, \
    TO_JSON_STRING(S.tags), TO_JSON_STRING(S.references), S.mitre_technique, TO_JSON_STRING(S.compliance_controls), S.loaded_at, \
    S.loaded_at, S.pipeline_id_int, S.pipeline_id_int, S.commit_sha, S.commit_sha, \
    S.branch, S.branch, 1 )
  "

  bq query --use_legacy_sql=false "
  MERGE \`${GCP_PROJECT_ID}.${BQ_DATASET}.finding_observations\` T \
  USING (SELECT finding_id, repo, branch, commit_sha, SAFE_CAST(pipeline_id AS INT64) AS pipeline_id, \
           CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS loaded_at, timestamp AS observed_at, severity, category, tool, status \
         FROM \`${GCP_PROJECT_ID}.${BQ_DATASET}.findings_normalized_staging_${STAGING_SUFFIX}\`) S \
  ON T.finding_id = S.finding_id AND T.pipeline_id = S.pipeline_id \
  WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( \
    finding_id, repo, branch, commit_sha, pipeline_id, loaded_at, observed_at, severity, category, tool, status \
  ) VALUES ( \
    S.finding_id, S.repo, S.branch, S.commit_sha, S.pipeline_id, S.loaded_at, S.observed_at, \
    S.severity, S.category, S.tool, S.status )
  "
fi

if [ "$HAS_INCIDENTS" = "true" ]; then
  bq query --use_legacy_sql=false "
  MERGE \`${GCP_PROJECT_ID}.${BQ_DATASET}.incidents\` T \
  USING (SELECT S.*, SAFE_CAST(S.pipeline_id AS INT64) AS pipeline_id_int, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS loaded_at \
         FROM \`${GCP_PROJECT_ID}.${BQ_DATASET}.incidents_staging_${STAGING_SUFFIX}\` S) S \
  ON T.incident_id = S.incident_id \
  WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET \
    repo = S.repo, branch = S.branch, commit_sha = S.commit_sha, \
    pipeline_id = S.pipeline_id_int, timestamp = S.timestamp, summary = S.summary, \
    title = S.title, severity = S.severity, risk_score = S.risk_score, confidence = S.confidence, \
    categories = TO_JSON_STRING(S.categories), mitre_techniques = TO_JSON_STRING(S.mitre_techniques), \
    related_findings = TO_JSON_STRING(S.related_findings), finding_count = S.finding_count, \
    primary_resource = S.primary_resource, recommended_action = S.recommended_action, \
    status = S.status, normalized_version = S.normalized_version, \
    last_seen_at = S.loaded_at, last_seen_pipeline_id = S.pipeline_id_int, \
    last_seen_commit_sha = S.commit_sha, last_seen_branch = S.branch, \
    seen_count = COALESCE(T.seen_count, 0) + 1 \
  WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( \
    incident_id, repo, branch, commit_sha, pipeline_id, timestamp, summary, title, \
    severity, risk_score, confidence, categories, mitre_techniques, related_findings, \
    finding_count, primary_resource, recommended_action, status, normalized_version, \
    first_seen_at, last_seen_at, first_seen_pipeline_id, last_seen_pipeline_id, \
    first_seen_commit_sha, last_seen_commit_sha, first_seen_branch, last_seen_branch, \
    seen_count ) VALUES ( \
    S.incident_id, S.repo, S.branch, S.commit_sha, S.pipeline_id_int, S.timestamp, \
    S.summary, S.title, S.severity, S.risk_score, S.confidence, TO_JSON_STRING(S.categories), \
    TO_JSON_STRING(S.mitre_techniques), TO_JSON_STRING(S.related_findings), S.finding_count, S.primary_resource, \
    S.recommended_action, S.status, S.normalized_version, S.loaded_at, S.loaded_at, \
    S.pipeline_id_int, S.pipeline_id_int, S.commit_sha, S.commit_sha, S.branch, \
    S.branch, 1 )
  "

  bq query --use_legacy_sql=false "
  MERGE \`${GCP_PROJECT_ID}.${BQ_DATASET}.incident_observations\` T \
  USING (SELECT incident_id, repo, branch, commit_sha, SAFE_CAST(pipeline_id AS INT64) AS pipeline_id, \
           CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS loaded_at, timestamp AS observed_at, severity, risk_score, status \
         FROM \`${GCP_PROJECT_ID}.${BQ_DATASET}.incidents_staging_${STAGING_SUFFIX}\`) S \
  ON T.incident_id = S.incident_id AND T.pipeline_id = S.pipeline_id \
  WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( \
    incident_id, repo, branch, commit_sha, pipeline_id, loaded_at, observed_at, severity, risk_score, status \
  ) VALUES ( \
    S.incident_id, S.repo, S.branch, S.commit_sha, S.pipeline_id, S.loaded_at, S.observed_at, \
    S.severity, S.risk_score, S.status )
  "
fi

# Clean up temporary staging tables
bq rm -f -t "${GCP_PROJECT_ID}:${BQ_DATASET}.findings_normalized_staging_${STAGING_SUFFIX}" || true
bq rm -f -t "${GCP_PROJECT_ID}:${BQ_DATASET}.incidents_staging_${STAGING_SUFFIX}" || true

steps.name: Verify BigQuery tables
steps.run:
bq show "${GCP_PROJECT_ID}:${BQ_DATASET}.findings_normalized"
bq show "${GCP_PROJECT_ID}:${BQ_DATASET}.incidents"

code_block:
name: Load to BigQuery
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: export_to_gcs
    outputs:
      skipped: ${{ steps.load.outputs.skipped }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout PipelineGuard
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          repository: CLUE-BDI/pipelineguard
          token: ${{ secrets.PIPELINEGUARD_PAT }}

      - name: Checkout target repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          repository: ${{ inputs.target_repository || github.repository }}
          token: ${{ secrets.PIPELINEGUARD_PAT }}
          path: ${{ inputs.target_repo_path }}

      - name: Authenticate to Google Cloud
        uses: google-github-actions/auth@v2
        with:
          credentials_json: ${{ secrets.GCP_CREDENTIALS || secrets.GCP_SA_KEY_JSON }}

      - name: Setup gcloud
        uses: google-github-actions/setup-gcloud@v2

      - name: Load into BigQuery
        id: load
        env:
          TARGET_REPO_NAME: ${{ inputs.target_repo_name }}
          REPO_NAME: ${{ github.event.repository.name }}
          BRANCH_NAME: ${{ github.ref_name }}
          RUN_ID: ${{ github.run_id }}
        run: |
          if bq ls "${GCP_PROJECT_ID}:${BQ_DATASET}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            echo "Dataset already exists: ${BQ_DATASET}"
          else
            echo "Creating dataset: ${BQ_DATASET}"
            bq --location=US mk --dataset "${GCP_PROJECT_ID}:${BQ_DATASET}"
          fi

          # Use direct paths as requested, avoiding wildcards to minimize permission requirements
          FINDINGS_GCS="gs://${GCS_BUCKET}/normalized/$REPO_NAME/$BRANCH_NAME/$RUN_ID/${TARGET_REPO_NAME}/findings.jsonl"
          INCIDENTS_GCS="gs://${GCS_BUCKET}/correlated/$REPO_NAME/$BRANCH_NAME/$RUN_ID/${TARGET_REPO_NAME}/incidents.jsonl"


          HAS_FINDINGS=false
          if gsutil ls "$FINDINGS_GCS" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            HAS_FINDINGS=true
            echo "Found findings in GCS: $FINDINGS_GCS"
          fi

          HAS_INCIDENTS=false
          if gsutil ls "$INCIDENTS_GCS" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            HAS_INCIDENTS=true
            echo "Found incidents in GCS: $INCIDENTS_GCS"
          fi

          if [ "$HAS_FINDINGS" = "false" ] && [ "$HAS_INCIDENTS" = "false" ]; then
            echo "Skipping ${TARGET_REPO_NAME}: no findings or incidents found at direct paths in GCS"
            echo "skipped=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            exit 0
          fi

          echo "skipped=false" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "Processing BigQuery load for ${TARGET_REPO_NAME}"

          # Clean repo name for valid BQ table suffix (replace hyphens with underscores)
          STAGING_SUFFIX=$(echo "${TARGET_REPO_NAME}" | tr '-' '_')

          if [ "$HAS_FINDINGS" = "true" ]; then
            bq load \
              --replace \
              --source_format=NEWLINE_DELIMITED_JSON \
              --autodetect \
              "${GCP_PROJECT_ID}:${BQ_DATASET}.findings_normalized_staging_${STAGING_SUFFIX}" \
              "$FINDINGS_GCS"
          fi

          if [ "$HAS_INCIDENTS" = "true" ]; then
            bq load \
              --replace \
              --source_format=NEWLINE_DELIMITED_JSON \
              --autodetect \
              "${GCP_PROJECT_ID}:${BQ_DATASET}.incidents_staging_${STAGING_SUFFIX}" \
              "$INCIDENTS_GCS"
          fi

          # Ensure target tables exist
          bq query --use_legacy_sql=false "
          CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS \
            \`${GCP_PROJECT_ID}.${BQ_DATASET}.findings_normalized\` ( \
              finding_id STRING, tool STRING, tool_finding_id STRING, category STRING, subcategory STRING, \
              severity STRING, confidence STRING, title STRING, description STRING, recommendation STRING, \
              rule_id STRING, rule_name STRING, file_path STRING, line_start INT64, line_end INT64, \
              code_snippet STRING, resource_type STRING, resource_name STRING, resource_namespace STRING, \
              package_name STRING, installed_version STRING, fixed_version STRING, secret_type STRING, \
              vulnerability_id STRING, repo STRING, branch STRING, commit_sha STRING, pipeline_id INT64, \
              scanner_stage STRING, timestamp TIMESTAMP, status STRING, environment STRING, raw_ref STRING, \
              raw_tool STRING, raw_severity STRING, normalized_version STRING, tags STRING, references STRING, \
              mitre_technique STRING, compliance_controls STRING, first_seen_at TIMESTAMP, last_seen_at TIMESTAMP, \
              first_seen_pipeline_id INT64, last_seen_pipeline_id INT64, first_seen_commit_sha STRING, \
              last_seen_commit_sha STRING, first_seen_branch STRING, last_seen_branch STRING, seen_count INT64 \
            )
          "

          bq query --use_legacy_sql=false "
          CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS \
            \`${GCP_PROJECT_ID}.${BQ_DATASET}.incidents\` ( \
              incident_id STRING, repo STRING, branch STRING, commit_sha STRING, pipeline_id INT64, \
              timestamp TIMESTAMP, summary STRING, title STRING, severity STRING, risk_score INT64, \
              confidence STRING, categories STRING, mitre_techniques STRING, related_findings STRING, \
              finding_count INT64, primary_resource STRING, recommended_action STRING, status STRING, \
              normalized_version STRING, first_seen_at TIMESTAMP, last_seen_at TIMESTAMP, \
              first_seen_pipeline_id INT64, last_seen_pipeline_id INT64, first_seen_commit_sha STRING, \
              last_seen_commit_sha STRING, first_seen_branch STRING, last_seen_branch STRING, seen_count INT64 \
            )
          "

          bq query --use_legacy_sql=false "
          CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS \
            \`${GCP_PROJECT_ID}.${BQ_DATASET}.finding_observations\` ( \
              finding_id STRING, repo STRING, branch STRING, commit_sha STRING, pipeline_id INT64, \
              loaded_at TIMESTAMP, observed_at TIMESTAMP, severity STRING, category STRING, tool STRING, status STRING \
            ) PARTITION BY DATE(loaded_at)
          "

          bq query --use_legacy_sql=false "
          CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS \
            \`${GCP_PROJECT_ID}.${BQ_DATASET}.incident_observations\` ( \
              incident_id STRING, repo STRING, branch STRING, commit_sha STRING, pipeline_id INT64, \
              loaded_at TIMESTAMP, observed_at TIMESTAMP, severity STRING, risk_score INT64, status STRING \
            ) PARTITION BY DATE(loaded_at)
          "

          if [ "$HAS_FINDINGS" = "true" ]; then
            bq query --use_legacy_sql=false "
            MERGE \`${GCP_PROJECT_ID}.${BQ_DATASET}.findings_normalized\` T \
            USING (SELECT S.*, SAFE_CAST(S.pipeline_id AS INT64) AS pipeline_id_int, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS loaded_at \
                   FROM \`${GCP_PROJECT_ID}.${BQ_DATASET}.findings_normalized_staging_${STAGING_SUFFIX}\` S) S \
            ON T.finding_id = S.finding_id \
            WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET \
              tool = S.tool, tool_finding_id = S.tool_finding_id, category = S.category, \
              subcategory = S.subcategory, severity = S.severity, confidence = S.confidence, \
              title = S.title, description = S.description, recommendation = S.recommendation, \
              rule_id = S.rule_id, rule_name = S.rule_name, file_path = S.file_path, \
              line_start = S.line_start, line_end = S.line_end, code_snippet = S.code_snippet, \
              resource_type = S.resource_type, resource_name = S.resource_name, \
              resource_namespace = S.resource_namespace, package_name = S.package_name, \
              installed_version = S.installed_version, fixed_version = S.fixed_version, \
              secret_type = S.secret_type, vulnerability_id = S.vulnerability_id, \
              repo = S.repo, branch = S.branch, commit_sha = S.commit_sha, \
              pipeline_id = S.pipeline_id_int, scanner_stage = S.scanner_stage, timestamp = S.timestamp, \
              status = S.status, environment = S.environment, raw_ref = S.raw_ref, \
              raw_tool = S.raw_tool, raw_severity = S.raw_severity, normalized_version = S.normalized_version, \
              tags = TO_JSON_STRING(S.tags), references = TO_JSON_STRING(S.references), mitre_technique = S.mitre_technique, \
              compliance_controls = TO_JSON_STRING(S.compliance_controls), last_seen_at = S.loaded_at, \
              last_seen_pipeline_id = S.pipeline_id_int, last_seen_commit_sha = S.commit_sha, \
              last_seen_branch = S.branch, seen_count = COALESCE(T.seen_count, 0) + 1 \
            WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( \
              finding_id, tool, tool_finding_id, category, subcategory, severity, confidence, title, \
              description, recommendation, rule_id, rule_name, file_path, line_start, line_end, \
              code_snippet, resource_type, resource_name, resource_namespace, package_name, \
              installed_version, fixed_version, secret_type, vulnerability_id, repo, branch, \
              commit_sha, pipeline_id, scanner_stage, timestamp, status, environment, raw_ref, \
              raw_tool, raw_severity, normalized_version, tags, references, mitre_technique, \
              compliance_controls, first_seen_at, last_seen_at, first_seen_pipeline_id, \
              last_seen_pipeline_id, first_seen_commit_sha, last_seen_commit_sha, first_seen_branch, \
              last_seen_branch, seen_count ) VALUES ( \
              S.finding_id, S.tool, S.tool_finding_id, S.category, S.subcategory, S.severity, \
              S.confidence, S.title, S.description, S.recommendation, S.rule_id, S.rule_name, \
              S.file_path, S.line_start, S.line_end, S.code_snippet, S.resource_type, \
              S.resource_name, S.resource_namespace, S.package_name, S.installed_version, \
              S.fixed_version, S.secret_type, S.vulnerability_id, S.repo, S.branch, \
              S.commit_sha, S.pipeline_id_int, S.scanner_stage, S.timestamp, S.status, \
              S.environment, S.raw_ref, S.raw_tool, S.raw_severity, S.normalized_version, \
              TO_JSON_STRING(S.tags), TO_JSON_STRING(S.references), S.mitre_technique, TO_JSON_STRING(S.compliance_controls), S.loaded_at, \
              S.loaded_at, S.pipeline_id_int, S.pipeline_id_int, S.commit_sha, S.commit_sha, \
              S.branch, S.branch, 1 )
            "

            bq query --use_legacy_sql=false "
            MERGE \`${GCP_PROJECT_ID}.${BQ_DATASET}.finding_observations\` T \
            USING (SELECT finding_id, repo, branch, commit_sha, SAFE_CAST(pipeline_id AS INT64) AS pipeline_id, \
                     CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS loaded_at, timestamp AS observed_at, severity, category, tool, status \
                   FROM \`${GCP_PROJECT_ID}.${BQ_DATASET}.findings_normalized_staging_${STAGING_SUFFIX}\`) S \
            ON T.finding_id = S.finding_id AND T.pipeline_id = S.pipeline_id \
            WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( \
              finding_id, repo, branch, commit_sha, pipeline_id, loaded_at, observed_at, severity, category, tool, status \
            ) VALUES ( \
              S.finding_id, S.repo, S.branch, S.commit_sha, S.pipeline_id, S.loaded_at, S.observed_at, \
              S.severity, S.category, S.tool, S.status )
            "
          fi

          if [ "$HAS_INCIDENTS" = "true" ]; then
            bq query --use_legacy_sql=false "
            MERGE \`${GCP_PROJECT_ID}.${BQ_DATASET}.incidents\` T \
            USING (SELECT S.*, SAFE_CAST(S.pipeline_id AS INT64) AS pipeline_id_int, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS loaded_at \
                   FROM \`${GCP_PROJECT_ID}.${BQ_DATASET}.incidents_staging_${STAGING_SUFFIX}\` S) S \
            ON T.incident_id = S.incident_id \
            WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET \
              repo = S.repo, branch = S.branch, commit_sha = S.commit_sha, \
              pipeline_id = S.pipeline_id_int, timestamp = S.timestamp, summary = S.summary, \
              title = S.title, severity = S.severity, risk_score = S.risk_score, confidence = S.confidence, \
              categories = TO_JSON_STRING(S.categories), mitre_techniques = TO_JSON_STRING(S.mitre_techniques), \
              related_findings = TO_JSON_STRING(S.related_findings), finding_count = S.finding_count, \
              primary_resource = S.primary_resource, recommended_action = S.recommended_action, \
              status = S.status, normalized_version = S.normalized_version, \
              last_seen_at = S.loaded_at, last_seen_pipeline_id = S.pipeline_id_int, \
              last_seen_commit_sha = S.commit_sha, last_seen_branch = S.branch, \
              seen_count = COALESCE(T.seen_count, 0) + 1 \
            WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( \
              incident_id, repo, branch, commit_sha, pipeline_id, timestamp, summary, title, \
              severity, risk_score, confidence, categories, mitre_techniques, related_findings, \
              finding_count, primary_resource, recommended_action, status, normalized_version, \
              first_seen_at, last_seen_at, first_seen_pipeline_id, last_seen_pipeline_id, \
              first_seen_commit_sha, last_seen_commit_sha, first_seen_branch, last_seen_branch, \
              seen_count ) VALUES ( \
              S.incident_id, S.repo, S.branch, S.commit_sha, S.pipeline_id_int, S.timestamp, \
              S.summary, S.title, S.severity, S.risk_score, S.confidence, TO_JSON_STRING(S.categories), \
              TO_JSON_STRING(S.mitre_techniques), TO_JSON_STRING(S.related_findings), S.finding_count, S.primary_resource, \
              S.recommended_action, S.status, S.normalized_version, S.loaded_at, S.loaded_at, \
              S.pipeline_id_int, S.pipeline_id_int, S.commit_sha, S.commit_sha, S.branch, \
              S.branch, 1 )
            "

            bq query --use_legacy_sql=false "
            MERGE \`${GCP_PROJECT_ID}.${BQ_DATASET}.incident_observations\` T \
            USING (SELECT incident_id, repo, branch, commit_sha, SAFE_CAST(pipeline_id AS INT64) AS pipeline_id, \
                     CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS loaded_at, timestamp AS observed_at, severity, risk_score, status \
                   FROM \`${GCP_PROJECT_ID}.${BQ_DATASET}.incidents_staging_${STAGING_SUFFIX}\`) S \
            ON T.incident_id = S.incident_id AND T.pipeline_id = S.pipeline_id \
            WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( \
              incident_id, repo, branch, commit_sha, pipeline_id, loaded_at, observed_at, severity, risk_score, status \
            ) VALUES ( \
              S.incident_id, S.repo, S.branch, S.commit_sha, S.pipeline_id, S.loaded_at, S.observed_at, \
              S.severity, S.risk_score, S.status )
            "
          fi

          # Clean up temporary staging tables
          bq rm -f -t "${GCP_PROJECT_ID}:${BQ_DATASET}.findings_normalized_staging_${STAGING_SUFFIX}" || true
          bq rm -f -t "${GCP_PROJECT_ID}:${BQ_DATASET}.incidents_staging_${STAGING_SUFFIX}" || true

      - name: Verify BigQuery tables
        if: steps.load.outputs.skipped != 'true'
        run: |
          bq show "${GCP_PROJECT_ID}:${BQ_DATASET}.findings_normalized"
          bq show "${GCP_PROJECT_ID}:${BQ_DATASET}.incidents"

  create_bigquery_views:
    name: Create BigQuery views

passed_checks.check_name: Ensure ACTIONS_ALLOW_UNSECURE_COMMANDS isn't true on environment variables

steps.name: Install gettext
steps.run: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y gettext-base

steps.name: Create BigQuery views
steps.run:
if ! bq show "${GCP_PROJECT_ID}:${BQ_DATASET}.findings_normalized" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "Missing table: ${GCP_PROJECT_ID}:${BQ_DATASET}.findings_normalized"
  exit 1
fi
if ! bq show "${GCP_PROJECT_ID}:${BQ_DATASET}.incidents" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "Missing table: ${GCP_PROJECT_ID}:${BQ_DATASET}.incidents"
  exit 1
fi
for f in sql/views/*.sql; do
  echo "Applying $f"
  envsubst < "$f" | bq query --use_legacy_sql=false
done

code_block:
name: Create BigQuery views
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: load_to_bigquery
    if: needs.load_to_bigquery.outputs.skipped != 'true'
    steps:
      - name: Checkout PipelineGuard
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          repository: CLUE-BDI/pipelineguard
          token: ${{ secrets.PIPELINEGUARD_PAT }}

      - name: Checkout target repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          repository: ${{ inputs.target_repository || github.repository }}
          token: ${{ secrets.PIPELINEGUARD_PAT }}
          path: ${{ inputs.target_repo_path }}

      - name: Authenticate to Google Cloud
        uses: google-github-actions/auth@v2
        with:
          credentials_json: ${{ secrets.GCP_CREDENTIALS || secrets.GCP_SA_KEY_JSON }}

      - name: Setup gcloud
        uses: google-github-actions/setup-gcloud@v2

      - name: Install gettext
        run: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y gettext-base

      - name: Create BigQuery views
        run: |
          if ! bq show "${GCP_PROJECT_ID}:${BQ_DATASET}.findings_normalized" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            echo "Missing table: ${GCP_PROJECT_ID}:${BQ_DATASET}.findings_normalized"
            exit 1
          fi
          if ! bq show "${GCP_PROJECT_ID}:${BQ_DATASET}.incidents" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            echo "Missing table: ${GCP_PROJECT_ID}:${BQ_DATASET}.incidents"
            exit 1
          fi
          for f in sql/views/*.sql; do
            echo "Applying $f"
            envsubst < "$f" | bq query --use_legacy_sql=false
          done
